gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) > '1996' AND T2.A2 = 'Beroun'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM account JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id WHERE district.A2 = 'Beroun' AND date(account.date) > '1996-12-31';
question: How many accounts in Beroun were opened after 1996?
